name: Enterprise Test Automation Framework
desc: Hybrid Selenium-TestNG automation framework built using the Page Object Model design pattern. The framework supports scalable test execution with modular architecture, reusable components and detailed reporting. It currently contains more than 150 automated test cases covering regression, smoke and sanity scenarios ensuring faster validation of enterprise web applications.

name: API Automation Framework
desc: Comprehensive REST API automation framework designed to validate more than 50 endpoints using request-response validation, schema verification and data driven execution. The framework ensures API stability, improves backend reliability and accelerates release validation by automating repeated service level test scenarios.

name: Banking Loan Workflow Suite
desc: End-to-end automation test suite validating complex banking loan workflows including KYC verification, eligibility checks, document validation and onboarding steps. The suite ensures smooth user journeys and helps prevent functional defects in critical financial application processes.

name: CrossBrowser Regression
desc: Automated regression testing suite executing the same test scenarios across multiple browsers including Chrome, Firefox and Microsoft Edge. This solution helps identify UI inconsistencies, browser specific failures and ensures consistent user experience across platforms.

name: Data Driven Framework
desc: A Selenium automation framework implementing data driven testing using Apache POI to read and manage test data from Excel files. The framework enables scalable execution with multiple datasets, improves reusability of test scripts and reduces duplication in automation logic.

name: Defect Management Workflow
desc: Structured defect lifecycle workflow integrated with Jira for tracking issues, performing root cause analysis and validating bug fixes. The system ensures clear communication between QA and development teams while maintaining traceability of defects throughout the testing lifecycle.

name: Smoke & Sanity Suite
desc: Lightweight automation test suite designed for quick validation of critical functionalities before every build release. It helps detect major issues early in the development cycle and provides rapid feedback on application stability.

name: Performance & Load Validation
desc: Performance testing solution implemented using Apache JMeter to simulate concurrent users and evaluate system behavior under peak load conditions. The tests measure response time, throughput and system stability to ensure reliable application performance.

name: CI/CD Integrated Automation Pipeline
desc: Continuous integration pipeline integrating Selenium automation with Jenkins to automatically trigger regression suites on every deployment. This setup ensures faster feedback cycles, early defect detection and stable delivery of application releases.
